<!-- GENERATED BY shared/scripts/flux — DO NOT EDIT -->

# FluxLink

An inline hyperlink. Set `href` for navigation *or* `action` for an auth-gated / custom dispatch — never both. Use `external=True` for off-surface URLs so the renderer adds the external-link affordance and `rel=noopener`.

**Extends:** `Text` (a2ui/basic@0.10)

**Category:** `primitive`

## Props

| Name | Type | Required | Default |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `accessibility` | `object` | no | `` |
| `action` | `object` | no | `` |
| `component` | `'FluxLink'` | yes | `` |
| `external` | `boolean` | no | `` |
| `href` | `string` | no | `` |
| `id` | `string` | yes | `` |
| `label` | `string` | yes | `` |
| `tone` | `'default' \| 'muted' \| 'danger'` | yes | `'default'` |
| `underline` | `'always' \| 'hover' \| 'never'` | yes | `'hover'` |

## Examples

_Internal navigation._

```python
UI.link("Pricing", href="/pricing")
```

_External link with external-icon affordance._

```python
UI.link("Read the docs", href="https://docs.example.com", external=True)
```

_Action-based link that triggers a server event instead of navigating._

```python
UI.link("Sign in to continue", action="open_auth_modal", tone="default")
```

## Anti-patterns

**Avoid:** A link has exactly one destination. Pick either `href` (navigate) or `action` (dispatch).

```python
UI.link("Buy", href="/checkout", action="buy")
```

**Avoid:** Empty `href` renders a broken anchor. Use `action` when there is no URL.

```python
UI.link("Click here", href="")
```

## Tokens used

- `$color.danger.solidHover`
- `$color.primary.solidHover`
- `$color.text.danger`
- `$color.text.link`
- `$color.text.muted`
- `$motion.duration.fast`
- `$motion.easing.standard`
- `$space.0_5`
- `$typography.weight.medium`

## Basic-catalog fallback

- **Component:** `Text`
- **Prop map:** `label` → `text`
- **Notes:** Basic catalog has no Link component; renderers degrade to inline Text with the label visible and the destination lost. The fluent guard warns when a FluxLink falls back to basic.
